AddOnInstructionDefinition.Name: T_DIFF
AddOnInstructionDefinition.RevisionNote: Release for V17 CD as Date/Time Examples
AddOnInstructionDefinition.AdditionalHelpText:
T_DIFF : Date/Time minus Date/Time gives Time Difference
This instruction is given two Date/Time points and determines the amount of time between them. The result is given in Days, Hours, Minutes, Seconds and Microseconds. (Years and Months are returned as zero, as the number of months is generally not used.) The Date/Time parameters must be valid Gregorian Dates and valid clock Times:
* 0 <= Microseconds < 1,000,000 * 0 <= Seconds < 60 (NOTE: this instruction cannot add leap seconds; sorry!) * 0 <= Minutes < 60 * 0 <= Hours < 24 * 1 <= Day <= 31 AND Date is a Valid Gregorian Date (see below) * 1 <= Month <= 12
... for results to be meaningful.
NOTE: This instruction does NOT switch to Julian dates for dates before 1582 (or 1753 or whenever your place of interest switched to the Gregorian Calendar -- see Wikipedia on for details)! This instruction assumes the Gregorian Calendar extends (about 5.8 million years) either side of CE! It DOES handle the Gregorian 4 / 100 / 400 year rules, so Feb. 29, 2000 is a valid date, but Feb. 29, 2100 is not. It DOES NOT handle Daylight Savings Time hour offsets when the Dates cross summer/winter time boundaries.

Parameter.Name: Ref_Out
Parameter.Description: Result: Amount of Time between Ref_DT1 and Ref_DT2

LocalTag.Name: Wrk_DaFromHr
LocalTag.Description: Number of Days to add from Hours

LocalTag.Name: Wrk_HrFromMin
LocalTag.Description: Number of Hours to add from Minutes

LocalTag.Name: Wrk_MinFromSec
LocalTag.Description: Number of Minutes to add from Seconds

LocalTag.Name: Wrk_SecFrom_uSec
LocalTag.Description: Number of Seconds to add from Microseconds

LocalTag.Name: Wrk_GD1
LocalTag.Description: Gregorian Day Number (calculated for given Y/M/D)

LocalTag.Name: Wrk_G1
LocalTag.Description: Used in calculating Gregorian Day Number (function of Year and F)

LocalTag.Name: Wrk_F1
LocalTag.Description: Used in calculating Gregorian Day Number (function of month)

LocalTag.Name: Wrk_F2
LocalTag.Description: Used in calculating Gregorian Day Number (function of month)

LocalTag.Name: Wrk_G2
LocalTag.Description: Used in calculating Gregorian Day Number (function of Year and F)

LocalTag.Name: Wrk_GD2
LocalTag.Description: Gregorian Day Number (calculated for given Y/M/D)
